notes: v0.2.1 baseline calibration. Linear scaling per layer, derived from OGE-320 model comparison + grid search via benchmarks/fit_calibration.py. REGEX/NER/RULES are corpus-tuned by hand and pass through unchanged (factor=1.0). LLM is discounted (factor=0.7) because Layer 3 over-fires false positives in v0.2 prompts; OGE-321 follow-up will revisit once prompt-narrowing lands.

REGEX.notes: Regex matches are binary; Presidio's confidence is already corpus-tuned per recognizer. Pass through.

NER.notes: spaCy NER scores via Presidio are well-calibrated against the en_core_web_lg corpus. Pass through.

RULES.notes: Rule confidences are hand-tuned constants (typically 0.88-0.97) plus context-window boosts. Pass through.

LLM.notes: Down from 0.85 (v0.2 baseline). Granite/Llama tested in OGE-320 over-report confidence on extracted spans; tighter discount yields better F1 alongside the v0.2 prompts. Refit via benchmarks/fit_calibration.py once OGE-321 prompt-narrowing lands.
